untranslatable_reason: Signal requires cross-sectional ranking and percentile calculation across entire stock universe (top/bottom decile identification). The allowed indicators are time-series based and do not support: (1) dynamic percentile threshold computation, (2) relative ranking across multiple securities, (3) monthly rebalancing logic with rank-based position allocation. This is a portfolio-level strategy requiring custom cross-sectional logic not expressible in single-security indicator conditions.
translation_notes: This is a classic Jegadeesh-Titman momentum strategy requiring: (1) calculation of 12-month returns for all stocks, (2) ranking by decile position, (3) portfolio construction from ranked groups. The backtest engine needs portfolio-level rule support with cross-sectional rank aggregation, not individual security indicator conditions. Recommend implementing as custom portfolio rule rather than individual signal conditions.
